title: Gemstone Sound Pack
description: A simple gemstone sound pack for Hypixel Skyblock
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93d1035274480d83bfe49c363f8748d106aaa9d2.png)
## Overview
This Gemstone Sound resource pack adds a custom audio when breaking glass.

Giving your gemstones a _rythmic_ feel when mining.

[Gemstone_Sounds.mp3](https://dl.sndup.net/tkznz/gemstone_sounds.mp3)

## Extra
This Gemstone Sound resource pack is just an overlay, making it compatible with most Skyblock resource packs.
